title: Feature Root: Rename project to agent-takt
description: Shared execution root for the full rename. This container bead is non-runnable; all concrete implementation, validation, documentation, and review work is sequenced under `children`.
acceptance_criteria: `pyproject.toml` publishes the project as `agent-takt` and exposes `takt = "agent_takt.cli:main"`.
The source package is renamed to `src/agent_takt/` and source/test imports no longer reference `codex_orchestrator`.
Runtime state uses `.takt/` paths, `AGENT_TAKT_RUNNER` takes precedence, and `ORCHESTRATOR_RUNNER` remains a silent fallback.
The repository root runtime state is migrated to `.takt/` and a `.orchestrator -> .takt` symlink remains for transition safety.
Repository docs, packaged skill/template content, and checked-in skill docs use `agent-takt`, `agent_takt`, `takt`, and `.takt` consistently.
Validation covers CLI help, key `takt` commands, importability of `agent_takt.cli`, grep-based rename checks, and the test suite with zero import errors.
